# Contributing

## Expectations

- Keep pull requests focused and explain the user-facing impact.
- Test the exact device, pairing, UI, or streaming paths your change affects.
- Do not commit local signing material, maintainer notes, workspace files, or private credentials.

## AI-Assisted Changes

AI-assisted drafting and refactoring are allowed, but contributors are responsible for correctness, security, licensing, and maintainability. Do not submit generated code you cannot explain, review, and test.

## Review Notes

- Call out changes to pairing, certificate handling, discovery, input capture, or exported Android components in the PR description.
- Include screenshots for visible UI changes when practical.
- Keep Moonlight-core changes targeted and easy to audit.
